subject: PayPal at Test Nonprofit
body:
Hi Scott,

I was looking at the work your team is doing at Test Nonprofit and followed the donation flow.

PayPal was never built for nonprofits. It was built for payments.

That means every donation still creates manual work on your side: donor record, tax receipt, thank-you email, follow-up, reporting, and eventually figuring out who should hear from you again.

That is the part most teams do not have time to keep chasing.

Sponsor A Purpose gives nonprofits a free CRM and donation platform where every gift automatically updates the donor record, sends the receipt, and gives your team a cleaner way to follow up.

No monthly fee. No credit card. No time limit.

I can show you what that looks like here:
https://meetings-na2.hubspot.com/sdefries

Morgan
Sponsor A Purpose
sponsorapurpose.org
